name: 25 MG Sertraline Tablets IP
about: 25 MG Sertraline Tablets IP is a general medicine used to treat depression, anxiety, and other mental health disorders. These tablets come in a physical form of a tablet and are packed in a quantity of 2x10 tablets per box. The dosage guidelines for this medicine should be followed as per the doctors suggestion. The medicine is manufactured in India and has a drug type of general medicines. The recommended dosage of this medicine is 25mg, and it should be stored in a dry and cool place.

faq.a: Sertraline is used to treat depression, anxiety, and other mental health disorders.

faq.q: How many tablets are present in a box of 25 MG Sertraline Tablets IP?
faq.a: There are 2x10 tablets present in a box of 25 MG Sertraline Tablets IP.

faq.q: What is the recommended dosage of 25 MG Sertraline Tablets IP?
faq.a: The recommended dosage of 25 MG Sertraline Tablets IP is 25mg, which should be taken as per the doctors suggestion.

faq.q: Where is 25 MG Sertraline Tablets IP manufactured?
faq.a: 25 MG Sertraline Tablets IP are manufactured in India.

faq.q: How should 25 MG Sertraline Tablets IP be stored?
faq.a: 25 MG Sertraline Tablets IP should be stored in a dry and cool place.
